creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #6)

Reply to myself... forgot maintainer approval in commit log.  Corrected below.

Proposed changelog:

- Apply vendor patch for "Avoid overflow in ljpeg_start()" (changeset 983bda1f) to prevent a denial of service (crash) via a crafted image

PR: 200199
Obtained from: https://github.com/rawstudio/rawstudio/commit/983bda1f0fa5fa86884381208274198a620f006e
Security: CVE-2015-3885
Security: 57325ecf-facc-11e4-968f-b888e347c638
Submitted by: Jason Unovitch <jason unovitch gmail com>
Reported by: Sevan Janiyan <venture37 geeklan co uk>
Approved by: samm os2 kiev ua (maintainer)
